zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Pakenham於大約1280年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉可比時，他的父親William I de Pakenham31歲，母親Joan de Morin26歲。他於1300年與Julia Agnes Hull在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1352年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Pakenham于大约1280年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉可比时，他的父亲William I de Pakenham31岁，母亲Joan de Morin26岁。他于1300年与Julia Agnes Hull在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1352年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Pakenham was born about 1280, in Kirkby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, William I de Pakenham, was 31 and his mother, Joan de Morin, was 26. He married Julia Agnes Hull in 1300, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1352, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Pakenham est né environ 1280, à Kirkby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William I de Pakenham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Morin, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Julia Agnes Hull en 1300, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1352, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Pakenham um 1280 in Kirkby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William I de Pakenham 31 und seine Mutter Joan de Morin 26. Er hat 1300 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Julia Agnes Hull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1352 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Pakenham è nato il circa 1280 nel Kirkby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, William I de Pakenham, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Morin, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Julia Agnes Hull nel 1300, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1352, all'età di 73 anni.
